projectDescription: MetricPanel is a privacy-focused web analytics platform that tracks pageviews and custom events, measures goals and funnels, and attributes revenue back to visitors and campaigns.
keyFeatures: Lightweight hosted tracking script (4.4 KB gzip) with automatic pageview, SPA, and outbound-link capture
JavaScript SDK with full consent, cookieless, and Do Not Track support
Goals (event, pageview, or either) with conversion rate and value tracking
Ordered funnels across URLs, events, and goals
Revenue attribution linked to visitor, session, UTM, and product for Stripe, Polar, LemonSqueezy, and Shopify
Alerts for revenue, traffic, goal, and error metrics delivered via Slack, email, or webhook
HMAC-signed event ingestion for secure server-side tracking
Privacy controls: consent mode, cookieless tracking, IP/geo suppression, and visitor deletion
Token-scoped public analytics API with stats, top breakdowns, raw events, and CSV export
First-party domain proxying for script and ingestion traffic
Import from Plausible for historical analytics continuity
React Native SDK for mobile app tracking
publicApiSurface: GET /api/v1/analytics/stats — aggregate stats (visitors, pageviews, sessions, revenue)
GET /api/v1/analytics/top — top pages, events, referrers, countries, devices
metricpanel.goal({ name, value, properties }) — goal event
metricpanel.revenue({ amount, currency, productId, ... }) — revenue event
metricpanel.grantConsent() / revokeConsent() / hasConsent() — SDK consent API
window.metricpanel.track(name, properties?) — hosted script event API
MetricPanelNativeSDK — React Native / native JS SDK
